hotel_name: Juniper Hotel Cupertino, Curio Collection by Hilton

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Room smell so bad from the shower curtain. Seems the staff don’t care and no response after I messaged them.

reviews.title: Bad experience
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Parking lot closed without notice
reviews.text: Upon checking in, no one informed us the parking lot is closed. At night, upon returning from dinner, we were directed to a far away remote parking without any Hilton sign and with homeless sleeping gon the bench. Dark and felt unsafe for the car and walk to go back to hotel. It took 5 mins to walk back in the dark and among homeless on the road. Hilton front desk said there is no one can help or escorts back from remote parking.

reviews.title: THE TERMS: FALSE ADVERTISING, Come to mind and the ‘under renovations’ BS; really doesn’t help your
reviews.positives:
None was provided because your restaurant was NOT OPEN ON WEEKENDS AND CLOSED AT 9pm On Friday night???
How this hotel is a Curio collection is Mind Boggling!!!
reviews.negatives: I worked in Predictve Analytics. Why don’t you use your algorithms to figure it out !!!

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text: Bad internet, breakfast not included, there are better options out there

reviews.title: People at the property were disingenuous.  After having a confirmation number , they simply refused to honor the reserva
reviews.negatives:
People at the property were disingenuous. 
After having a confirmation number , they simply refused to honor the reservation saying they are sold out . Then they proceeded to offer me a booking at a lower tier hotel , in a different city !!!
They lied relentlessly stating that they tried to contact me and when I stated walking them through my missed calls list , they just started at 
me !!! I have not had such a bad , unprofessional, experience at any other Hilton property. The manager was repeatedly lying  ….

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: lousy employee service at front desk

reviews.title: Weren't honest about broken AC...overall bad experience.
reviews.positives: The location was close to Mountain Winery. We were there for a concert.
reviews.negatives: We check in the room and noticed it was a little warm, so we turned up the AC. We noticed the room wasn't super clean, we found a fake nail on the bathroom sink area. When we returned from the concert, the room was super hot. When we called the front desk they let us know that the AC wasn't working. They offered to bring up a small fan. I asked why we weren't told when we booked and/or when we checked in. No answer. If we would have been told the AC was broken we never would have booked the room, or we would have cancelled and found a hotel that had AC.

reviews.title: Ok hotel for the USA
reviews.text: Clean comfortable room , history itself was ok critic was the restaurant had a limited menu nice drinks but kicks you out at 10 and already starts closing at 2130. Nowhere that I could see that was codusive form lounge meetings  or discussions . As a place to sleep was ok

reviews.title: Poorly operated & managed
reviews.negatives: Had to changes to 3 different rms due to not being clean, a syringe in the drawer & ac motor broken. In our 3rd rm there was no iron board & shampoo dispenser was empty. When I called guest services I was hung up on by McKenna.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Some pictures of the rooms layout looks different in person
reviews.room_type: 1 KING BED OVERSIZED CORNER ROOM WITH SOFA

reviews.title: Will never be back. I could have got the same room at a motel for half the price.
reviews.negatives: Hotel run down, beds need new mattresses,bathroom door hard to close scrapes on floor, no bathroom vent, toilet clogged at 10:30pm no maintenance person on duty. Someone finally came buy and handed me a plunger, I had too unclog the toilet. I can’t believe your a Hilton hotel.

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text: Very nice and a good value.  Very clean and responsive housekeeping. Would recommend to family and friends.

reviews.title: never coming back
reviews.negatives: being given a spoon and a knife for my carry out dinner of salmon and NO FORK.  being told i HAD to have the carrots w/the dinner because "it was all together" and I couldn't substitute any other vegetable or lettuce in the kitchen -- it wasn't.  the whole carrots were lying on top and could have easily been swapped out.  every single available outlet in the main room did not work except for the lamp right by the bed, so i had to plug the coffee pot, my phone and my laptop into that one outlet.  having a remote for the TV.  banging all nite long due to the hallway door not being sealed and closing properly -- there was a gap around the entire door of about 1/2 inch so every hallway sound was in my ear, in spite of ear plugs.  no insulation between rooms so i heard the guy next door's entire phone conversation, the banging of him in bed against the wall we shared, getting up at 4am, etc.  only cups for tea, water, etc were baby cups far too small to make a cup of tea in -- even in the restaurant!

reviews.title: So far so good
reviews.text: Hotel in strategy location and its very convenient.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Masstress to soft ans old
Room IS only cleaned on demand

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Asked for a fresh towels & pillow cases but there were stain. Carpet needs more vacuuming on the corners.

reviews.title: An unspectacular, ordinary, disappointing hotel
reviews.negatives:
The room was not at all what I expected. The furniture was covered in smudges, there was rust in the bath tub and lime build up in the shower head. The room had an amazing view of a wall and window of the neighboring building.
 The website only showed two pictures of room, one of the room and one of the sink. The only reason I picked this hotel was for the large tub which they told me later is only in the suite. With over 50 options of rooms I wasnt able to know that. They were very rude when I asked about it and said it was my fault and there was nothing they could do.
 On top of all this, the restaurant was closed and one of the two elevators was broken making it a long crowded ride every time.
 A very unspectacular, ordinary and disappointing hotel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Upon check-in the king suite we reserved was unavailable. We were given a corner suite and offered a $45 voucher for the in house restaurant. The room was spacious but needed dusting and seemed otherwise clean. Bed was comfortable and staff were friendly. Restaurant was just OK and drinks were pricey.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Double billing

reviews.title: Satisfaction
reviews.text: Satisfied with the location & room.

reviews.title: If people bought room with breakfast included,  that's what they want, there is no half and half!
reviews.positives: Location is good,  my kids like the Area.
reviews.negatives: I bought the room with breakfast included because it was my son's birthday,  but at the Hotel, I WAS TOLD, the breakfast didn't included the Kids...how sad is that!?????? I bought the room for two kids and two adults,  very miss leading!!! I did not tell my kids, because they like the Hotel, it matter for me. The refrigerator was too small, we could not put anything, our food in it.

reviews.title: Nice and clean
reviews.text: Very clean and nice room. Bed was very comfortable.  I will stay here again

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location. Hotel has 0 upgrades and 0 price reductions

reviews.title: feedback
reviews.text: I was disappointed that the coffee that used to be available in the lobby the last several times that I stayed there no longer is there.  The little pot in the room does not do much for me. both quality and quantity. for the price of the room that is the least they could do

reviews.title: After cleaning the rooms , everything should be checked to make sure things are working
reviews.negatives: Tv show in bedroom was not working . Had a technician in our room for almost 1 1/2 hours going in and out of our room trying to fix the problem .

reviews.title: Great hotel, great value
reviews.text: Hotel is centrally located. Room is spacious. Parking is free, so it is great. Pool is a ways away and not part of the hotel. L, which is the only con. Room was still a bit dusty, but the beds were comfortable.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: No Novar no room service awful

reviews.title: Comfortable,  clean  and restful
reviews.text: My wife and I had a 3 day stay and the hotel was wonderful.  Very clean and comfortable room.  (No microwave, but available in the main lobby). Curtains were heavy and we were able to sleep in.

reviews.title: It was a decent stay . Not likely to stay again
reviews.negatives: No amenities in the room or the hotel .. room lacked a microwave oven , coffee creamer, sugar was not refilled correctly .. either no sugar or no creamer .. bathroom looked old .. no breakfast in the plan . Not family friendly place

reviews.title: Night halt
reviews.text: We checked in at night and moved out in morning, checkin was smooth

reviews.title: Nice hotel, but don't expect the niceties.
reviews.positives: Nice lobby, restaurant and the rooms are nice. It is centrally located.
reviews.negatives: This hotel looks like a nice hotel, but they oddly miss the mark a bit. It felt like they are pinching pennies - one must ask to have the room made up, no robes, and no amenities supplied in the bathroom. The restaurant was closed during some normal business hours. So maybe, I being picky, but the hotel looks upmarket, but acted like a standard mid-range hotel.

reviews.title: Pleasant staycation
reviews.text: Nice overnight getaway - large room, comfortable bed , exercise facility & many nearby Asian eateries. Pleasant & friendly staff.
reviews.room_type: 1 KING BED PREMIER ROOM - HIGH FLOOR

reviews.title: I will mark this hotel as a no-go for future visits to the area.
reviews.positives: Room was clean, and bed was comfortable
reviews.negatives:
We arrived at almost midnight. I could not find a parking spot at the closed garage and looked for a space for about 15 minutes. I got lucky someone drove away while I was searching a parking spot. I don't know where I would have parked if that person did not leave.

After you park at the garage the elevators don't work without the room key card, which is very inconvenient if you have stuff in your car and you need to carry them to your room. Your only option is the stairs with your hands full.

The gentleman who checked us in was very unfriendly and was at the border of being rude, and I did not like the check-in experience a bit!

reviews.title: decent stay
reviews.text: We enjoyed our 2 night stay at Juniper. Beds were super comfy, hotel staff friendly, only downside was that the swimming pool was not on location...5 min walk away.
reviews.room_type: 2 QUEEN BEDS PREMIER ROOM W/ HIGH FLOOR

reviews.title: it was pretty ok, value for money.
reviews.positives: the property was clean, and the beds were comfortable
reviews.negatives: the room was very basic, the TV didn't have any possibility of connecting our apps like Netflix, Disney+, Apple TV to it.

reviews.title: A comfortable night.
reviews.text: The hotel offers a comfortable stay with everything well-equipped. Breakfast is not in buffet style but is served by ordering a specific menu, which was disappointing as there were no options like fruit or yogurt for a balanced meal. The free parking lot was spacious and pleasant to park in, which was a plus.

reviews.title: More than likely will stay at place that has a bar
reviews.positives: Location and very clean and quiet.
reviews.negatives:
Very disappointed the bar is closed on weekends. Had I known that in advance I probably would
not have booked the stay.

reviews.title: Good Value for money by Hilton
reviews.text: Hard to find entrance, but everything else are fine.

reviews.title: Well located but overrated and expensive for what it is
reviews.negatives: Very expensive for what it is. Everything feels a bit old. Access to the pool is complicated. Windows are small so my room was very dark despite being on the top floor.

reviews.title: Great employees, stayed 3 times here
reviews.text:
Good location. Near Apple. 

Employees are very good hospitality. They always smile. 

Facilites are great! Fitness room is good. 

Coffee in the room is amazing.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The weekend staff are friendly I almost stayed during the week and the staff are rude on the weekdays
reviews.negatives: Price during the week outrageous and the staff are rude

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Good hotel if u like quiet environment.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The restaurant/lounge isn’t open on weekends.

reviews.title: Prime location
reviews.text: Juniper hotel Cupertino is right in the middle of the city center, very easy to get around. Free parking for all guests.

reviews.title: Loved the environment and the comfort of the room!
reviews.positives: Loved the location and the feel of the hotel
reviews.negatives: The air quality in the room was terrible - so hard to breathe properly. I have asthma so felt like I was gasping for air because the fan did not help.

reviews.title: Very pleasant
reviews.text: My wife and I had a wonderful experience at Juniper Hotel.  It was a great location, safe and clean setting and very nice and helpful staff, including housekeeping staff.  The room was inviting and we were able to really relax. Thank you Juniper hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: N a

reviews.title: Decent Hotel
reviews.text: Very clean hotel located close to De Anza college. Plenty of parking, EV charging available, and friendly staff. Would stay here again if I have to be back in Cupertino

reviews.negatives: Ditto

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.positives: The room was spacious and clean. Shower water pressure is good.
reviews.negatives: I’m surprised that there aren’t any complimentary coffee or tea offered in the lobby.

reviews.title: Great clean hotel, strategic location
reviews.text: We have stayed for several times here. Love the spacious two queen room, the free parking, and the location. It is near several Asian supermarkets that I come to San Jose for, and only 10-15 minute drive to nice shopping malls.

reviews.title: Comfortable and satisfying stay
reviews.text: The accommodation was clean and well-maintained, located in a comfortable area for shopping and dining, making it ideal for a visit to Silicon Valley. The facilities in the hotel are also well updated, and the friendly staff provided a simple check-in/check-out process, along with comfortable beds and sofas that were satisfactory. One downside is that it would feel more modern if they offered options like Netflix or YouTube instead of just cable TV.

reviews.title: Overall, very happy with my stay. I would definitely stay again.
reviews.positives: Room was spacious and clean. Very comfortable bed and pillows.
reviews.negatives: Heater fan was vibrating and making load sound when on. TV Remote was broken. Plastic case that holds batteries in place was broken.

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.text: Location is the best thing about this hotel besides its charm and friendly staff.
reviews.room_type: 2 QUEEN BEDS PREMIER ROOM W/ HIGH FLOOR

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: did not replenish my coffee daily

reviews.title: Great hotel, especially on weekends
reviews.text: Clean, comfortable, quiet AC - highly recommended.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel. Would stay again.
reviews.positives: Clean, friendly staff, easy free parking.

reviews.title: Great Stay
reviews.text: We stayed at the hotel for 3 days 2 nights. It was a pleasant stay. Location was great. The bathroom was not well-stocked though. Free parking was great

reviews.title: Nice hotel for a visit to Cupertino for nearby family wedding.
reviews.positives: Most everything about the hotel was very good. The service at the restaurant was slow on Sunday morning since there was only one waitress who was doing her best to take care of everyone. Location, parking, facilities are all very nice.
reviews.negatives: My single complaint was the fire alarm went off on Saturday night but only for floors 1-5. We were on the 9th floor and slept peacefully through it and heard about it the next morning from other folks staying on the lower floors. Obviously, this is concerning from a guest safety viewpoint. Fortunately, the fire department gave the all clear and guests were able to return to their room within 30 minutes. But what about us on the upper floors? Expendable?

reviews.title: Juniper
reviews.text: No breakfast,  no microwave. No windows.  Lovely otherwise

reviews.title: Very nice hotel, neat San Jose Airport,.
reviews.positives: Friendly and helpful staff, excellent rooms.

reviews.title: It's stylish and a great spot
reviews.text: When you can get a good rate it's a must try. It's tucked away has parking close to local spots to eat and shop. Great seating for lounging. Love the honey staff is quick and proffecinal. Incidentals are not outrages and no resort fee. The safest town in the bay bear the freeways. Cupertino has rich history if you know the locals. I should start a historical timeline museum of the town.  The one they have at memorial park is not rich enough with its tales of history. If you only knew. Juniper is one of the original 3 grand hotels that exist there. Also if your a tech proffecional it's a key location with desks in room and great lobby sitting area for  casual meets  for worm. Thamk you

reviews.text: A quiet, clean hotel with an excellent location and attentive staff—I am very satisfied.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: Parking when I came back to the hotel later was difficult. All handicap were taken.

reviews.title: Nice

reviews.title: It was a short and very comfortable stay

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: Clean rooms. Front desk was really friendly and helpful. This will be my default choice whenever I'm in Cupertino.

reviews.title: Great location and wonderful hotel!
reviews.positives: The staff is accommodating and communicative via text. No room-related surprises upon arrival.  We nearly borrowed their bikes, but slept in since the beds were so comfy and quiet. Parking was included with our stay! The elevators were fast, even for the 9th floor.
reviews.negatives: If checking in late, the parking garage entrance can be tricky to find.

reviews.title: Great stopover at the city
reviews.text: Well-maintained, spacious room, quiet (no traffic noise in the back-facing room, except the heater's noise), free parking, wonderful stay!

reviews.title: Lovely, roomy, centrally located apartment with great view of LA.
reviews.positives: Lovely view of Los Angeles from Griffith Observatory to downtown; roomy, well-appointed apartment; centrally located and convenient for the touristy activities we scheduled as well as visiting our son in Los Feliz. We did pay the extra for the underground parking, and we found it to be a must. The one code number for all access points was extremely convenient, so kudos for that.
reviews.negatives: Check-in at 4:00 meant we were navigating rush-hour traffic while trying to find on-street parking. BTW, that was impossible, pay for the underground parking, easily worth the peace of mind. Important to note that the person messaging me as we were trying to check in was extremely quick to respond and very accommodating. So we had someone holding our hand while getting into the building. If it had been me along trying to do all this, rather than my husband driving and me texting, it would have been dicey.

reviews.title: Right on the money
reviews.text: Slightly old, the rest is good, easy for guest parking, location convenient

reviews.title: Loved everything. Thank you
reviews.negatives: Absolutely nothing

reviews.title: Always a great stay
reviews.text: Though I may struggle finding the hotel every time that I come, due to it usually being nighttime, I enjoy the hotel, and its location is perfect. I recommend it to anyone who is staying in the area and wants quality without paying double the price.
reviews.room_type: 2 QUEEN BEDS PREMIER ROOM W/ HIGH FLOOR

reviews.title: Hotel is great location

reviews.text: Love staying here because it is clean and comfy. The facilities are nice and gym is open 24/7, they provide fresh water at the gym. Staff has always been very nice. The prices to stay here fluctuate greatly . I definitely try to stay here when the prices are not too expensive!

reviews.title: Be ready to pay for anything extra
reviews.negatives: The limit of people can have a breakfast. We booked the room for a family of 4, breakfast included. When we came to restaurant it appeared only maximum two people are allowed to have breakfast. So, it was always question either kids have it or parents.

reviews.title: Quiet area with a lot nearby
reviews.text: This hotel was a perfect fit for my travel plans. It was in a quiet area of the city, but only a short drive from many points of interest in the city. The staff was friendly and helpful. Would stay again.

reviews.title: Great location and well appointed room with an excellent shower!
reviews.positives: Great location, lovely room, awesome shower and it was great to also have a bath to relax in.
reviews.negatives: The first room I was given smelled of cigarette smoke but they gave me another room that was much better.

reviews.title: Great value! Great hotel!
reviews.text: What more can I say, great value, great hotel, great location, professional staff who texted to see if we needed anything, I really liked that much more non invasive than the room call.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives: NA

reviews.title: Great Price, Excellent Price, Great Menu, Room Service, Excellent Food.
reviews.text: The Juniper Hotel Cupertino A Curio Collection By Hilton is a lovely establishment, well designed, excellent food from room service, mini soda bar, and friend, great cable. However, when using the Agoda, the room did not come with free wi-fi. And when in the hotel room, the hotel sends a blocking signal that disables your cell phone to receive incoming calls, text message, access your mobile data, it leaves your mobile device completely suspended.

reviews.title: Quite room on the 3rd floor
reviews.text: The room was very quiet, and we both slept really well. Although we had a king bed, it seemed smaller than a standard king, but it was still comfortable and we enjoyed our night. Accessing the parking area was a bit confusing since it’s located down a small alley. Other than that, the staff and guests were all very kind.

reviews.title: 場所は最高ですが割高です
reviews.text:
お客様の事務所に歩いて行ける数少ないホテルです。
サンフランシスコと比べても随分と割高な感じがしますが、最近は周りに少しづつ食べ物屋さん等も出来始めて少しは便利になりました。

reviews.title: Comfotable but. .
reviews.text: I was satisfied with the location and the condition of the accommodation, but even though it was a non-smoking room, when I first entered the room, it smelled like cannabis, so it was hard.

reviews.room_type: 1 KING DELUXE MOBILITY ACC W/ RI-SHOWER

reviews.title: Convenient Location / Poor Front Office Service
reviews.text: Whilst i enjoyed my stay at the hotel as it was very conveniently located to all places that i wished to visit, upon checking in the front office gentleman left an ugly taste. Staying there for 6 nights, he could not accomodate an early check in request, 3 hours prior to check in time, and insisted he had to charge for it despite having a room available. Poor poor poor hospitality from Hilton.
